mapper.select:
SELECT b.board_number, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_category, b.created_date, b.modified_date, b.view_count, u.user_name, u.user_number FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_number = u.user_number
AND b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.board_category = #{category}
ORDER BY b.created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_number = u.user_number
AND b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.board_category = #{category}

SELECT b.board_number, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_category, b.created_date, b.modified_date, b.view_count, u.user_name, u.user_number FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_number = u.user_number WHERE b.board_number = #{boardNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (board_title, board_content, board_category, user_number, created_date, modified_date, view_count) VALUES (#{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardCategory}, #{userNumber}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET board_title = #{boardTitle}, board_content = #{boardContent}, board_category = #{boardCategory}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE board_number = #{boardNumber} AND user_number = #{userNumber}
